query: sodium vapor street light orange yellow night photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / sickly_cast — sodium vapor street light cast, orange/yellow night tint

response.objective_caption: A nighttime urban street lined with palm trees wrapped in multicolored LED strip lights along a tiled sidewalk. A row of tall street lamps illuminates the multi-lane road where a white vehicle is parked near the curb. Multi-story commercial buildings with illuminated windows and signage line the right side of the avenue, and additional vehicles are visible further down the road under a dark sky.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A tilted nighttime urban street scene with a pronounced sickly yellow-orange sodium vapor color cast covering the road and surfaces. Palm trees wrapped in cool neon LED lights create aggressive clashing disharmony against the warm sodium street lighting. The street lamps exhibit exposure extremes with blown-out highlights radiating starburst halation. The off-level framing shows a parked white vehicle, tiled pedestrian walkways, and illuminated commercial buildings receding into the distance under a dark sky.
